Meta.Title: 5-Day GRE Prep Plan (Quant AM, Verbal PM, Mixed Review Evenings)
Meta.Summary: A structured 5-day GRE study plan with mornings focused on quant (algebra, geometry, data interpretation), afternoons on verbal (vocabulary, reading, logic), and evenings on mixed review. Each day includes short breaks between blocks plus a logistics section for materials, timing, and tracking.

Materials.Item: Official GRE Quantitative Reasoning and Verbal Reasoning practice questions (official source preferred)
Full-length practice test (official or high-quality equivalent)
Vocabulary list/app with spaced repetition capability
Error log (notebook or spreadsheet) with columns: Date, Topic, Question ID, Error Type, Fix, Re-do Date
Formula sheet (one-page) for geometry and algebra rules; update daily
Timer (phone or web timer) and scratch paper
Reading passages source (official passages or reputable GRE-style sets)

Timing.DefaultDayWindow: Approx. 6 to 7.5 hours total study time per day

BlockPattern.Block: 25 min focus + 5 min break (for vocabulary/review sprints)

SessionTargets.Target: Quant mornings: 2 to 3 focused blocks + short drill set
Verbal afternoons: 2 to 3 focused blocks + timed mini set
Evenings: 60 to 90 min mixed review + error log updates

Timing.WeeklyNote: Day 4 includes a timed full-length or section test; Day 5 emphasizes consolidation and re-dos.

Tracking.Metric: Accuracy by topic (algebra, geometry, data interpretation; vocab, reading, logic)
Average time per question (quant and verbal timed sets)
Error categories: concept gap, misread, careless, pacing, strategy
Re-do performance on previously missed questions

Setup.Item: Before each timed set: decide pacing goal and strategy (skip/return rules)
After each set: review all missed and all guessed questions
Daily: add 5 to 10 items to the formula sheet and/or vocab master list only if repeatedly missed

Day.Focus: Foundations and baseline: algebra fundamentals, vocab system, reading approach

Activities.Activity: Review: linear equations/inequalities, exponents/roots, factoring, ratios
Worked examples (10 to 15) focusing on method selection
Translate words to equations; units and rate problems
Practice set: 15 questions untimed, then re-do 5 hardest
10 questions timed; focus on pacing and skipping rules
Quick review: mark misses/guesses for afternoon review queue

WrapUp.Activity: Update error log and start/refresh formula sheet (5 key rules)

Activities.Activity: Learn 30 to 40 high-frequency words with example sentences
Spaced repetition drill (recognition and production)
Practice: 3 passages (mix short and long); identify main point, tone, structure
Write 1-sentence summary per paragraph for long passage

Block.Topic: Verbal - Logic for sentence equivalence/text completion

Activities.Activity: Strategy: clue hunting, prediction, and contrast words
Practice: 12 questions timed; review wrong choices

WrapUp.Activity: Vocab reinforcement: 10-min rapid review of new words

Block.Topic: Mixed review - Error log deep review

Activities.Activity: Re-solve all missed/guessed questions from Day 1 without looking
Write the fix: concept, strategy, and a one-line reminder
Quant: 5 algebra questions timed
Verbal: 5 TC/SE questions timed

Day.Focus: Geometry core + reading accuracy + vocab expansion

Activities.Activity: Lines/angles/triangles; special right triangles; area/perimeter
Mini-notes: common traps (units, choosing formulas)
Circle properties, arc/sector basics; slope and distance
Practice set: 15 questions mixed difficulty
12 questions timed; note which problems you should skip earlier
Immediate review of 3 most time-consuming questions

WrapUp.Activity: Update formula sheet: 5 geometry facts you keep forgetting

Activities.Activity: Learn 30 to 40 new words; group by meaning (positive/negative/neutral)
Drill: mixed set including Day 1 words (spaced repetition)
4 passages; focus on evidence for each answer choice
For each wrong answer: label why it is wrong (too extreme, out of scope, reversed)
Practice: 15 questions timed; enforce prediction before options
Review: make a list of common clue types (contrast, cause, concession)
Re-do 10 questions from Days 1 to 2 (mix quant and verbal)
Update error log; schedule re-do date for any repeat misses
Quant: 8-question mixed timed sprint
Verbal: 8-question mixed timed sprint

Day.Focus: Data interpretation + verbal logic and passage mapping + targeted fixes

Activities.Activity: Tables/graphs; percent change; averages/weighted averages
Practice: 2 data sets with full question groups
Timed set: 3 data sets; aim for steady pace and clean arithmetic
Review: identify whether errors are math vs reading the chart
15-question mixed set timed
Pick 3 misses and write a short rule for each
Learn 25 to 35 new words; add synonyms/antonyms
Drill: 10-min recall test without choices
3 long passages; map purpose of each paragraph
Practice question types: inference, function, author attitude
18 questions timed; focus on multi-blank logic and coherence
Post-review: note 5 recurring distractor patterns
Choose top 2 weak quant subtopics and do 10 questions each (untimed then timed)
Choose top 1 weak verbal subtopic and do 15 questions timed

WrapUp.Activity: Update formula sheet and vocab list; schedule Day 4 test strategy goals

Day.Focus: Timed practice and test-like execution + thorough review

Activities.Activity: Complete one full quant section (or 20-question set) timed
Mark guesses and time sinks in real time (do not stop the timer)
Analyze misses/guesses; categorize error type
Re-solve without notes; write the minimal fix for each

WrapUp.Activity: Drill 5 questions targeting the most common error type from the section

Activities.Activity: Complete one full verbal section timed
Use a consistent approach: passage first-read discipline; prediction for TC/SE
Review misses/guesses; identify why the right answer is right (text evidence)
Log errors and create 3 rule reminders for next timed set

WrapUp.Activity: Vocabulary quick cycle: review all words from Days 1 to 4 (spaced repetition)

Block.Topic: Mixed review - Full-length option or mixed set

Activities.Activity: If time/energy: take a full-length practice test; otherwise do a second mixed timed set (quant + verbal)
Light review only (flag items) if full-length test is taken late

WrapUp.Activity: Plan Day 5 based on the top 3 issue areas revealed by timed work

Day.Focus: Polish, re-dos, strategy reinforcement, and light taper

Activities.Activity: Re-do the 15 most instructive missed quant questions from prior days
For each: write the fastest valid method and the trap to avoid
15-question mixed timed sprint; practice calm pacing and skipping
Review only misses/guesses

WrapUp.Activity: Finalize formula sheet (one page). Remove clutter and keep only essentials.

Activities.Activity: Review all learned words; focus on the 40 you miss most
Create 10 sentence pairs using tricky words to lock meaning

Block.Topic: Verbal - Reading and logic final set

Activities.Activity: Timed set: 2 passages + 12 TC/SE questions
Review with evidence-based explanations

WrapUp.Activity: Write a one-page verbal strategy checklist for test day

Activities.Activity: Review error log: pick top 10 recurring issues and write fixes
Re-do 10 mixed questions (5 quant, 5 verbal) at comfortable pace

Block.Topic: Mixed review - Light taper and readiness

Activities.Activity: Prepare materials for next day: IDs, test confirmation, pencils, scratch policy awareness
Set sleep and meal plan; stop heavy studying 1 to 2 hours before bed
